gl-issue.description: Pick up a GitLab issue: description, comments, images downloaded locally, related MRs — everything to start working.

gl-mr.description: Review a merge request: branch, pipeline, reviewer/approval, linked issue, diff stat, comments — the full dashboard.

gl-pipeline.description: What passed, what failed? Pipeline jobs grouped by stage with statuses and failed job IDs.

gl-job.description: Why did this job fail? MR context + error pattern search + log tail — the actual error, not 500 lines of setup.
